articles.title: Jason Derulo to perform live at Dubai World Cup 2026 on March 28
articles.summary: Dubai World Cup 2026 is set to be a grand affair with pop star Jason Derulo headlining the post-race concert on March 28. The event boasts $30.5 million in prize money and promises a spectacular celebration following the world's richest race day. Tickets are now available, including concert access.

articles.title: Dense morning fog blankets UAE: What’s causing near-zero visibility and when it will improve?
articles.summary: The UAE has experienced "Red Alert" fog events, causing near-zero visibility and significant travel disruptions. This seasonal phenomenon, typical of late winter, is driven by high pressure trapping moisture, calm winds, and high humidity. While fog is expected to persist through February, clearer skies and warmer days are anticipated by early March as spring arrives.

articles.title: 'My heritage isn’t an insult': Indian-origin Texas candidate fires back at reporter over mockery
'Charlie was martyred for his beliefs': Donald Trump pays tribute to the Kirks in State of the Union speech
'Always been Keralam': UAE Malayalis react to Kerala's proposed name change
What is Dalilah's Law? Trump seeks license ban for illegal immigrants after Indian-origin driver case
articles.summary: US President Trump has proposed "Dalilah's Law," aiming to prevent states from granting driver's licenses to undocumented immigrants. The legislation is named after Dalilah Coleman, a young girl severely injured in a crash allegedly caused by an undocumented truck driver. Trump also advocated for stricter criminal justice reforms, emphasizing keeping repeat offenders incarcerated.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia bans poultry imports from 40 countries including India amid health concerns
articles.summary: Saudi Arabia has implemented extensive import bans on poultry and table eggs from 40 countries due to ongoing disease concerns, primarily avian influenza. An additional 16 nations face regional import restrictions. Exemptions are available for heat-treated products meeting strict health and certification requirements.

articles.title: 'Bad policy, but nice guy': Donald Trump on NYC mayor Zohran Mamdani
articles.summary: During his State of the Union address, US President Trump unexpectedly mentioned New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, calling him a "nice guy" despite ideological differences. Trump used Mamdani as an example to advocate for stricter voter ID laws, contrasting the requirements for a snow-shoveling job with those for voting.

articles.title: 'Pakistan PM would have died... ': Donald Trump misspeaks in State of the Union address - what he meant
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump claimed during his State of the Union address that his intervention prevented a nuclear war between India and Pakistan, stating the Pakistan Prime Minister would have died without his involvement. He cited praise from the Pakistani PM for saving "35 million" lives. However, India has rejected any third-party mediation in de-escalating tensions during Operation Sindoor.

articles.title: 'Black people aren't apes!' US lawmaker Al Green escorted out for protest during Donald Trump's speech
articles.summary: During President Trump's State of the Union, Democratic Rep. Al Green was removed from the House chamber for holding a sign stating 'Black people aren’t apes!' This protest referenced a racist video of the Obamas on Trump's social media. Green aimed for Trump to see the message, asserting Black people are not apes.

articles.title: Mistaken identity? 57-year-old Gurudwara cook who was kidnapped and killed was not intended target
articles.summary: A Sikh temple volunteer, Avtaar Singh, was abducted and found dead in California, authorities confirmed. Officials stated Singh was not the intended target of the kidnapping, which occurred after another individual for a specific, undisclosed reason. His body was discovered nearly 100 miles from the temple where he was last seen.

articles.title: Rodeo champion Kelsie Domer’s 3 year old daughter Oaklynn dies after tragic horse accident during medical episode
articles.summary: Rodeo champion Kelsie Domer’s 3 year old daughter Oaklynn died on February 19 after a horse suffered a medical episode and fell on them. Kelsie survived but Oaklynn did not. The news was shared through an obituary and reported by Rodeo Life. The rodeo community honored Oaklynn by wearing pink and sharing heartfelt tributes.

articles.title: Is the 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule at risk? FIFA addresses relocation fears amid rising security concerns
articles.summary: Security concerns in parts of Mexico have raised questions about whether 2026 FIFA World Cup matches could be relocated. FIFA says it is closely monitoring the situation with authorities and prioritizes safety. Officials stress that moving games would be a last resort, and the tournament across the United States, Canada, and Mexico remains scheduled as planned.

articles.title: Jake Paul’s fiance Jutta Leerdam earns royal honour at Huis ten Bosch Palace after record breaking Olympic win
articles.summary: Jutta Leerdam won gold in the 1,000m and silver in the 500m at the Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. After her success, she was named a Knight of the Order of Orange-Nassau by the Dutch royal family. The ceremony took place at Huis ten Bosch Palace. Jake Paul celebrated proudly as fans praised her achievements online.

articles.title: Antonela Roccuzzo Net Worth in 2026: Inside Lionel Messi’s wife’s rise from Rosario to global influencer
articles.summary: Antonela Roccuzzo, Lionel Messi’s wife, has built an estimated $20 million net worth through modeling, brand partnerships, and social media influence. Born in Rosario, she grew from a private figure into a global lifestyle icon. With major fashion collaborations, philanthropic work, and over 40 million followers, she balances family life with business success and international recognition.

articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo and Georgina Rodriguez combined net worth in 2026: Football player and model wife among richest couples with $1.4 billion fortune
articles.summary: Football superstar Cristiano Ronaldo and his partner Georgina Rodriguez are among the world's richest athletes. By 2026, Ronaldo's wealth is projected to be around $1.4 billion from his Al Nassr contract, Nike deal, and businesses. Georgina's net worth is estimated at $10 million from modeling and her Netflix series. Together, their combined wealth is substantial.

articles.title: Alysa Liu reveals emotional post-Olympic life plan after gold, hints at unexpected future beyond competitive figure skating
articles.summary: Alysa Liu captured Olympic gold at the 2026 Milano Cortina Games with a powerful free skate, becoming the first American woman in years to reach that milestone. Her victory, along with team gold, marked a major moment for U.S. figure skating. Now, Liu is looking beyond medals, sharing her interest in fashion, storytelling, and creative expression. Her Olympic moment has become both an athletic triumph and the start of a broader personal journey.

articles.title: LA Knight and Michelle Yavulla combined net worth in 2026: WWE salary, brand value, and financial success story
articles.summary: WWE's LA Knight, real name Shaun Ricker, is a rising star with impressive mic skills and charisma. His career success, boosted by a new contract and merchandise sales, is reflected in his growing net worth. Knight's financial success, alongside his wife Michelle Yavulla, is projected to reach $4-10 million by early 2026, showcasing their strong presence in sports entertainment.

articles.title: Why MLB added the ABS challenge system? Disputed fourth pitch in Spring Training shows its importance
articles.summary: Major League Baseball introduced an automated ball-and-strike (ABS) challenge system to improve fairness and consistency in officiating. This hybrid approach allows players to challenge calls, aiming to reduce prolonged arguments and keep the game moving. Influenced by minor league tests and a recent Spring Training dispute, the system preserves umpire judgment while leveraging technology for accuracy.

articles.title: Fact check: Did Megyn Kelly help Candace Owens produce “Bride of Charlie” trailer about Erika Kirk and Charlie Kirk?
articles.summary: After backlash followed the trailer release, Megyn Kelly publicly responded to claims about her involvement. She focused on the exact language used by Candace Owens and denied that a direct murder accusation was made against Erika Kirk. Kelly’s comments, shared on her SiriusXM program, have added fresh attention to the ongoing public debate.
